title: Time Zone Adjustment
excerpt: Any update on the Time Zone adjustment feature? We use it across our teams to set times to post our social media but if I put in 9am, our counterparts in Denver see 7am, so they post at 7am…not helpful especially for cri…

posts.author: cmwestover (Christina)
posts.cookedHtml:
Any update on the Time Zone adjustment feature? We use it across our teams to set times to post our social media but if I put in 9am, our counterparts in Denver see 7am, so they post at 7am…not helpful especially for critical press releases…

any ideas on how to remedy?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @cmwestover, thanks for posting about this! Have you tried having your counterparts adjust their timezone individually, through My Profile >> Personal Info? I’d love to hear if this would work.
